# Fresh Local Niagara

> A community-built directory of local food purveyors across the Niagara Region, Ontario, Canada.

Fresh Local Niagara helps residents and visitors discover where to buy directly from local farmers, artisans, and producers in the Niagara Peninsula — from Jordan Station and Grimsby in the west to Niagara-on-the-Lake and Fort Erie in the east.

## What we list

- **Farm Stands** — seasonal roadside markets, fresh produce direct from farms
- **Artisan Cheese** — local cheesemakers and specialty cheese shops
- **Butchers & Meats** — local butchers, natural/hormone-free meat producers, charcuterie
- **Bakeries** — artisan bread, sourdough, pastries, pies
- **Orchards & U-Pick** — apples, peaches, cherries, strawberries, pumpkins
- **Maple & Honey** — local maple syrup producers, apiaries, mead
- **Specialty Food** — farm breweries, wineries, lavender farms, gourmet food shops
- **Markets** — farmers markets, year-round food halls

## Coverage area

The Niagara Region, Ontario, Canada — including Grimsby, Beamsville, Jordan, Vineland, St. Catharines, Niagara Falls, Niagara-on-the-Lake, Welland, Pelham, Fonthill, Fenwick, and surrounding communities.

## Data

Each listing includes name, category, city, address, phone, website, hours, and geolocation (latitude/longitude). Listings are community-maintained — business owners can claim their listing to add photos and custom information.

## About

Built to support the local food economy in Niagara. Not affiliated with any government or tourism body. Run by a local Niagara resident who believes in knowing where your food comes from.

## Contact

Website: https://freshlocalniagara.ca
